features.name: large_unpacked_memory_with_initial_block_init
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked memory array (more than 1000 elements) with initialization via initial block sequential assignments

features.name: synchronous_memory_read_write_ports
features.description: Code should include synchronous memory read and write operations using always @(posedge clk) with conditional enables
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) if (we==1) storage[address_p] <= dp;
always @(posedge clk) if (re==1) datata<=storage[address];
